```
177.   'zoemail.org', 'zomg.info',
178. ])
179. 
180. export function validateEmail(email: string): EmailValidationResult {
181.   const trimmed = email.trim().toLowerCase()
182. 
183.   if (!EMAIL_REGEX.test(trimmed)) {
184.     return { valid: false, reason: 'invalid_format' }
185.   }
186. 
187.   const [localPart, domain] = trimmed.split('@')
188. 
189.   // Reject domains without a dot in the TLD part
190.   if (!domain || !domain.includes('.')) {
191.     return { valid: false, reason: 'invalid_domain' }
192.   }
193. 
194.   // Reject role-based prefixes
195.   if (ROLE_PREFIXES.has(localPart)) {
196.     return { valid: false, reason: 'role_address' }
197.   }
198. 
199.   // Reject disposable/throwaway domains
200.   if (DISPOSABLE_DOMAINS.has(domain)) {
201.     return { valid: false, reason: 'disposable_email' }
202.   }
203. 
204.   // Also check parent domain (e.g. sub.mailinator.com)
205.   const domainParts = domain.split('.')
206.   if (domainParts.length > 2) {
207.     const parentDomain = domainParts.slice(-2).join('.')
208.     if (DISPOSABLE_DOMAINS.has(parentDomain)) {
209.       return { valid: false, reason: 'disposable_email' }
210.     }
211.   }
212. 
213.   return { valid: true }
214. }
215. 
216. /** User-facing error messages keyed by reason */
217. export const VALIDATION_MESSAGES: Record<string, string> = {
218.   invalid_format: 'Please enter a valid email address.',
219.   role_address: 'Please use a personal or team business email, not a shared inbox.',
220.   disposable_email: 'Disposable or temporary email addresses are not accepted. Please use your business email.',
221.   invalid_domain: 'The email domain does not appear to be valid.',
222. }
223.
```

</details>

```
1. (() => {
2.   'use strict'
3. 
4.   /* ─── State ─────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
5.   const state = {
6.     industryId: null,
7.     industryData: null,
8.     aiFeatures: new Set(),
9.     modules: new Set(),
10.     includeRetainer: false,
11.   }
12. 
13.   /* ─── Data (injected by server via data-json attribute) ──────── */
14.   let DATA = { industries: [], aiFeatures: [], odooModules: [] }
15.   try {
16.     const el = document.getElementById('qb-data')
17.     if (el) DATA = JSON.parse(el.dataset.json || '{}')
18.   } catch (_) {}
19. 
20.   /* ─── DOM refs ───────────────────────────────────────────────── */
21.   const $ = (id) => document.getElementById(id)
22. 
23.   /* ─── Pricing calculation (mirrors src/utils/pricing.ts) ─────── */
24.   function calculateQuote() {
25.     const ind = DATA.industries.find(i => i.id === state.industryId)
26.     if (!ind) return null
27. 
28.     const aiCost = [...state.aiFeatures].reduce((s, id) => {
29.       const f = DATA.aiFeatures.find(f => f.id === id)
30.       return s + (f ? f.cost : 0)
31.     }, 0)
32. 
33.     const modCost = [...state.modules].reduce((s, id) => {
34.       const m = DATA.odooModules.find(m => m.id === id)
35.       return s + (m ? m.cost : 0)
36.     }, 0)
37. 
38.     const totalSel = state.aiFeatures.size + state.modules.size
39.     const days = Math.ceil(ind.avgDeploymentDays * (1 + (totalSel / 10) * 0.15))
40.     const supportCost = days * 800
41.     const retainerCost = state.includeRetainer ? 8000 : 0
42.     const subtotal = ind.baseCost + aiCost + modCost + supportCost + retainerCost
43.     const vat = Math.round(subtotal * 0.05)
44.     const total = subtotal + vat
45. 
46.     const goLive = new Date()
47.     goLive.setDate(goLive.getDate() + days)
48. 
49.     return { baseCost: ind.baseCost, aiCost, modCost, supportCost, retainerCost, subtotal, vat, total, days, goLive }
50.   }
51. 
52.   /* ─── Format ─────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
53.   function fmt(n) {
54.     return 'AED ' + n.toLocaleString('en-AE')
55.   }
56. 
57.   function fmtDate(d) {
58.     return d.toLocaleDateString('en-AE', { day: 'numeric', month: 'short', year: 'numeric' })
59.   }
60. 
61.   /* ─── Update Pricing UI ──────────────────────────────────────── */
62.   function updatePricingUI() {
63.     const q = calculateQuote()
64.     if (!q) return
65. 
66.     const set = (id, val) => { const el = $(id); if (el) el.textContent = val }
67. 
68.     set('qb-base-cost', fmt(q.baseCost))
69.     set('qb-ai-cost', fmt(q.aiCost))
70.     set('qb-mod-cost', fmt(q.modCost))
71.     set('qb-support-cost', fmt(q.supportCost))
72.     set('qb-subtotal', fmt(q.subtotal))
73.     set('qb-vat', fmt(q.vat))
74.     set('qb-total', fmt(q.total))
75.     set('qb-days', String(q.days))
76.     set('qb-golive-date', 'Est. ' + fmtDate(q.goLive))
77. 
78.     const retainerRow = $('qb-retainer-row')
79.     if (retainerRow) retainerRow.style.display = state.includeRetainer ? '' : 'none'
80.   }
```

```
181.

184.     doc.setFontSize(22)
185.     doc.setFont('helvetica', 'bold')
186.     doc.text('SGC TECH AI', 18, 28)
187. 
188.     doc.setTextColor(...GRAY)
189.     doc.setFontSize(9)
190.     doc.setFont('helvetica', 'normal')
191.     doc.text('Enterprise AI & ERP Solutions', 18, 35)
192. 
193.     // Quote number / date
194.     doc.setTextColor(...GRAY)
195.     doc.setFontSize(9)
196.     doc.text(quoteNum, W - 14, 22, { align: 'right' })
197.     doc.text(today, W - 14, 28, { align: 'right' })
198. 
199.     // Divider
200.     doc.setDrawColor(...CYAN)
201.     doc.setLineWidth(0.4)
202.     doc.line(18, 42, W - 14, 42)
203. 
204.     // Title

207.     doc.setFont('helvetica', 'bold')
208.     doc.text('Custom Implementation', 18, 60)
209.     doc.setTextColor(...CYAN)
210.     doc.text('Proposal', 18, 72)

212.     // Customer block

216.     doc.text('Prepared for:', 18, 90)
217.     doc.setTextColor(...WHITE)
218.     doc.setFontSize(14)
219.     doc.setFont('helvetica', 'bold')
```

### ✅ `task`

**Implementing lead form + email + Odoo**

<details>
<summary>Arguments</summary>

````json
{
  "name": "lead-form-implementation",
  "agent_type": "executor",
  "description": "Implementing lead form + email + Odoo",
  "mode": "background",
  "prompt": "\nImplement a lead capture gate + Zoho SMTP email + Odoo CRM sync for the `/quote-builder` page on a Hono v4 + Cloudflare Pages project.\n\n## Repository root\n`C:\\Users\\branm\\sgc-tech-ai-landing`\n\n## Stack constraints\n- Hono v4 SSR on Cloudflare Pages (Workers runtime)\n- `cloudflare:sockets` is available (compat date `2026-04-13`, `nodejs_compat` flag)\n- `public/static/` files are NOT bundled — plain JS IIFE, no imports\n- Env accessed via `(c.env as any).BINDING_NAME`\n- KV binding is `AIRA_BRAIN_KV`\n- `wrangler.jsonc` is JSONC format (allows comments)\n- **No nodemailer/Node net module** — use `cloudflare:sockets` TCP for SMTP\n\n## CREDENTIALS (never commit actual values — use `wrangler secret put` for secrets)\n- SMTP host: `smtppro.zoho.com`, port `465` (SSL)\n- SMTP user (from address): `hello@scholarixglobal.com`  \n- SMTP pass: `uyV78bbvKttK` → env var `SMTP_PASS` (secret)\n- Notification recipient: `info@sgctech.ai`\n- Odoo URL: `https://scholarixglobal.com`\n- Odoo DB: `scholarixglobal`\n- Odoo login email: `info@scholarixglobal.com`\n- Odoo API key: env var `ODOO_API_KEY` (secret — user will generate from Odoo Settings > API Keys)\n\n---\n\n## Files to create/modify\n\n### 1. CREATE `src/utils/smtp.ts`\n\nMinimal SMTP-over-TLS client for Cloudflare Workers using `cloudflare:sockets`:\n\n```typescript\n/**\n * Minimal SMTP-over-TLS (implicit SSL, port 465) client for Cloudflare Workers.\n * Uses cloudflare:sockets for raw TCP with TLS. \n * Sends HTML emails via Zoho SMTP (smtppro.zoho.com:465).\n */\n// @ts-ignore — cloudflare:sockets is a CF Workers runtime module\nimport { connect } from 'cloudflare:sockets'\n\nexport interface SmtpConfig {\n  host: string\n  port: number\n  user: string    // SMTP username (= from address)\n  pass: string    // SMTP app password\n  fromName?: string\n}\n\nexport interface EmailMessage {\n  to: string | string[]\n  subject: string\n  html: string\n  text?: string\n}\n\n/** Send an HTML email via Zoho SMTP over TLS (port 465) */\nexport async function sendEmail(config: SmtpConfig, msg: EmailMessage): Promise<void> {\n  const toList = Array.isArray(msg.to) ? msg.to : [msg.to]\n  const fromDisplay = config.fromName\n    ? `\"${config.fromName}\" <${config.user}>`\n    : config.user\n\n  // Build MIME multipart/alternative message\n  const boundary = `----=_Part_${Date.now().toString(36)}_${Math.random().toString(36).slice(2)}`\n  const subjectB64 = `=?utf-8?B?${btoa(unescape(encodeURIComponent(msg.subject)))}?=`\n  const plainText = msg.text || msg.html.replace(/<[^>]+>/g, '').replace(/\\s+/g, ' ').trim()\n\n  const mimeLines = [\n    `From: ${fromDisplay}`,\n    `To: ${toList.join(', ')}`,\n    `Subject: ${subjectB64}`,\n    `MIME-Version: 1.0`,\n    `Content-Type: multipart/alternative; boundary=\"${boundary}\"`,\n    ``,\n    `--${boundary}`,\n    `Content-Type: text/plain; charset=utf-8`,\n    `Content-Transfer-Encoding: base64`,\n    ``,\n    btoa(unescape(encodeURIComponent(plainText))),\n    ``,\n    `--${boundary}`,\n    `Content-Type: text/html; charset=utf-8`,\n    `Content-Transfer-Encoding: base64`,\n    ``,\n    btoa(unescape(encodeURIComponent(msg.html))),\n    ``,\n    `--${boundary}--`,\n  ]\n\n  // Dot-stuffing: lines starting with '.' need a leading extra '.'\n  const mimeBody = mimeLines\n    .map(line => (line === '.' ? '..' : line.startsWith('.') ? '.' + line : line))\n    .join('\\r\\n')\n\n  // Open TCP socket with immediate TLS (implicit SSL, port 465)\n  // @ts-ignore\n  const socket = connect(\n    { hostname: config.host, port: config.port },\n    { secureTransport: 'on' }\n  )\n\n  const enc = new TextEncoder()\n  const dec = new TextDecoder()\n  let buf = ''\n\n  const reader = socket.readable.getReader()\n  const writer = socket.writable.getWriter()\n\n  /** Read from socket, accumulating into `buf`, extract one complete SMTP response */\n  async function readResponse(): Promise<{ code: number; text: string }> {\n    const lines: string[] = []\n    while (true) {\n      // Try to pull a complete line from buffer\n      let nlIdx = buf.indexOf('\\n')\n      while (nlIdx < 0) {\n        const { value, done } = await reader.read()\n        if (done) throw new Error('SMTP: connection closed unexpectedly')\n        buf += dec.decode(value)\n        nlIdx = buf.indexOf('\\n')\n      }\n      const line = buf.slice(0, nlIdx).replace(/\\r$/, '')\n      buf = buf.slice(nlIdx + 1)\n      lines.push(line)\n      // Multi-line response: \"CODE-text\" is continuation; \"CODE text\" is last line\n      if (line.length < 4 || line[3] === ' ') {\n        const code = parseInt(line.slice(0, 3), 10)\n        return { code, text: lines.join('\\n') }\n      }\n    }\n  }\n\n  async function cmd(command: string): Promise<{ code: number; text: string }> {\n    await writer.write(enc.encode(command + '\\r\\n'))\n    return readResponse()\n  }\n\n  async function expect(command: string, expectedCode: number): Promise<void> {\n    const resp = await cmd(command)\n    if (resp.code !== expectedCode) {\n      throw new Error(`SMTP error after \"${command.split(' ')[0]}\": expected ${expectedCode}, got ${resp.code}\\n${resp.text}`)\n    }\n  }\n\n  try {\n    // Greeting\n    const greeting = await readResponse()\n    if (greeting.code !== 220) throw new Error(`SMTP: unexpected greeting ${greeting.code}`)\n\n    // EHLO\n    await expect(`EHLO ${config.host}`, 250)\n\n    // AUTH LOGIN\n    const authStart = await cmd('AUTH LOGIN')\n    if (authStart.code !== 334) throw new Error(`SMTP: AUTH LOGIN failed: ${authStart.text}`)\n\n    const authUser = await cmd(btoa(config.user))\n    if (authUser.code !== 334) throw new Error(`SMTP: auth user step failed: ${authUser.text}`)\n\n    const authPass = await cmd(btoa(config.pass))\n    if (authPass.code !== 235) throw new Error(`SMTP: authentication failed: ${authPass.text}`)\n\n    // Envelope\n    await expect(`MAIL FROM:<${config.user}>`, 250)\n    for (const to of toList) {\n      await expect(`RCPT TO:<${to}>`, 250)\n    }\n\n    // DATA\n    const dataResp = await cmd('DATA')\n    if (dataResp.code !== 354) throw new Error(`SMTP: DATA rejected: ${dataResp.text}`)\n\n    // Message body — terminate with \\r\\n.\\r\\n\n    await writer.write(enc.encode(mimeBody + '\\r\\n.\\r\\n'))\n    const sendResult = await readResponse()\n    if (sendResult.code !== 250) throw new Error(`SMTP: message rejected: ${sendResult.text}`)\n\n    // Quit\n    await writer.write(enc.encode('QUIT\\r\\n'))\n    await readResponse().catch(() => {}) // ignore quit response errors\n\n  } finally {\n    try { await writer.close() } catch { /* ignore */ }\n    try { await socket.close() } catch { /* ignore */ }\n  }\n}\n```\n\n### 2. CREATE `src/utils/odoo.ts`\n\nOdoo JSON-RPC CRM lead creation:\n\n```typescript\n/**\n * Odoo JSON-RPC client for creating CRM leads.\n * Uses Odoo's /jsonrpc endpoint with API key authentication.\n * \n * Setup: Generate an API key in Odoo → Settings → Technical → API Keys\n * Set as Cloudflare secret: wrangler secret put ODOO_API_KEY\n */\n\nexport interface OdooConfig {\n  url: string         // e.g. https://scholarixglobal.com\n  db: string          // e.g. scholarixglobal\n  user: string        // login email\n  apiKey: string      // API key from Odoo settings\n}\n\nexport interface LeadData {\n  company: string\n  email: string\n  mobile: string\n  industryName: string\n  quoteNumber: string\n  totalAmount: number\n  features: string[]\n  modules: string[]\n}\n\nasync function jsonRpc(url: string, service: string, method: string, args: unknown[]): Promise<unknown> {\n  const res = await fetch(`${url}/jsonrpc`, {\n    method: 'POST',\n    headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },\n    body: JSON.stringify({\n      jsonrpc: '2.0',\n      method: 'call',\n      id: Date.now(),\n      params: { service, method, args },\n    }),\n  })\n  if (!res.ok) throw new Error(`Odoo HTTP error: ${res.status}`)\n  const data = await res.json() as { result?: unknown; error?: { message: string } }\n  if (data.error) throw new Error(`Odoo RPC error: ${data.error.message}`)\n  return data.result\n}\n\n/** Create a CRM lead in Odoo. Returns the new lead ID, or throws on failure. */\nexport async function createOdooLead(config: OdooConfig, lead: LeadData): Promise<number> {\n  // Authenticate to get uid\n  const uid = await jsonRpc(config.url, 'common', 'authenticate', [\n    config.db, config.user, config.apiKey, {},\n  ]) as number\n\n  if (!uid) throw new Error('Odoo: authentication failed — check credentials')\n\n  // Build description\n  const description = [\n    `Quote Reference: ${lead.quoteNumber}`,\n    `Industry: ${lead.industryName}`,\n    `Total Amount: AED ${lead.totalAmount.toLocaleString()}`,\n    ``,\n    `AI Features: ${lead.features.length > 0 ? lead.features.join(', ') : 'None'}`,\n    `ERP Modules: ${lead.modules.length > 0 ? lead.modules.join(', ') : 'None'}`,\n    ``,\n    `Source: SGC TECH AI Quote Builder (sgctech.ai/quote-builder)`,\n  ].join('\\n')\n\n  // Create lead\n  const leadId = await jsonRpc(config.url, 'object', 'execute_kw', [\n    config.db, uid, config.apiKey,\n    'crm.lead', 'create',\n    [{\n      name: `[${lead.quoteNumber}] ${lead.company} — ${lead.industryName}`,\n      partner_name: lead.company,\n      email_from: lead.email,\n      mobile: lead.mobile,\n      description,\n      type: 'lead',\n      source_id: false,\n      tag_ids: [],\n    }],\n  ]) as number\n\n  return leadId\n}\n```\n\n### 3. CREATE `src/utils/email-templates.ts`\n\nHTML email templates for customer quote and internal notification:\n\n```typescript\n/**\n * HTML email templates for the SGC TECH AI quote builder.\n * Dark navy brand theme consistent with the website.\n */\n\nexport interface QuoteEmailData {\n  company: string\n  mobile: string\n  quoteNumber: string\n  industryName: string\n  baseCost: number\n  aiCost: number\n  modCost: number\n  supportCost: number\n  retainerCost: number\n  subtotal: number\n  vat: number\n  total: number\n  days: number\n  goLiveDate: string\n  aiFeatureNames: string[]\n  moduleNames: string[]\n  includeRetainer: boolean\n}\n\nfunction fmt(n: number): string {\n  return 'AED ' + n.toLocaleString('en-AE')\n}\n\nfunction row(label: string, value: string, highlight = false): string {\n  const bg = highlight ? '#0d3b4a' : 'transparent'\n  const color = highlight ? '#00d9ff' : '#b4bed2'\n  const weight = highlight ? 'bold' : 'normal'\n  return `\n    <tr>\n      <td style=\"padding:8px 12px;background:${bg};color:${color};font-weight:${weight};\">${label}</td>\n      <td style=\"padding:8px 12px;background:${bg};color:${color};font-weight:${weight};text-align:right;\">${value}</td>\n    </tr>`\n}\n\nexport function buildCustomerEmailHtml(email: string, data: QuoteEmailData): string {\n  const featureList = data.aiFeatureNames.length\n    ? data.aiFeatureNames.map(f => `<li style=\"margin:4px 0;color:#b4bed2;\">${f}</li>`).join('')\n    : '<li style=\"color:#b4bed2;\">None selected</li>'\n\n  const moduleList = data.moduleNames.length\n    ? data.moduleNames.map(m => `<li style=\"margin:4px 0;color:#b4bed2;\">${m}</li>`).join('')\n    : '<li style=\"color:#b4bed2;\">None selected</li>'\n\n  return `<!DOCTYPE html>\n<html lang=\"en\">\n<head><meta charset=\"utf-8\"><meta name=\"viewport\" content=\"width=device-width,initial-scale=1\"></head>\n<body style=\"margin:0;padding:0;background:#070a1a;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;\">\n  <table width=\"100%\" cellpadding=\"0\" cellspacing=\"0\" style=\"background:#070a1a;padding:32px 16px;\">\n    <tr><td align=\"center\">\n      <table width=\"600\" cellpadding=\"0\" cellspacing=\"0\" style=\"max-width:600px;width:100%;background:#0b0e27;border:1px solid #1a2044;border-radius:12px;overflow:hidden;\">\n\n        <!-- Header -->\n        <tr><td style=\"background:#0b0e27;padding:32px 32px 16px;border-bottom:2px solid #00d9ff;\">\n          <table width=\"100%\"><tr>\n            <td><span style=\"font-size:20px;font-weight:bold;color:#00d9ff;letter-spacing:1px;\">SGC TECH AI</span>\n              <div style=\"font-size:11px;color:#b4bed2;margin-top:2px;\">Enterprise AI &amp; ERP Solutions</div></td>\n            <td align=\"right\"><span style=\"font-size:11px;color:#b4bed2;\">${data.quoteNumber}</span></td>\n          </tr></table>\n        </td></tr>\n\n        <!-- Greeting -->\n        <tr><td style=\"padding:28px 32px 12px;\">\n          <h1 style=\"margin:0 0 8px;font-size:22px;color:#ffffff;\">Your Custom Quote is Ready</h1>\n          <p style=\"margin:0;color:#b4bed2;font-size:14px;line-height:1.6;\">\n            Hi ${data.company}, thank you for using the SGC TECH AI Quote Builder.\n            Below is your personalised implementation proposal for the <strong style=\"color:#00d9ff;\">${data.industryName}</strong> industry.\n          </p>\n        </td></tr>\n\n        <!-- Total highlight -->\n        <tr><td style=\"padding:0 32px 24px;\">\n          <div style=\"background:#0d3b4a;border:1px solid #00d9ff;border-radius:8px;padding:20px 24px;text-align:center;\">\n            <div style=\"font-size:12px;color:#b4bed2;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:1px;margin-bottom:6px;\">Total Investment (inc. 5% VAT)</div>\n            <div style=\"font-size:32px;font-weight:bold;color:#00d9ff;\">${fmt(data.total)}</div>\n            <div style=\"font-size:12px;color:#b4bed2;margin-top:6px;\">Est. Go-Live: ${data.goLiveDate} · ${data.days} working days</div>\n          </div>\n        </td></tr>\n\n        <!-- Pricing breakdown -->\n        <tr><td style=\"padding:0 32px 24px;\">\n          <h2 style=\"font-size:14px;color:#ffffff;margin:0 0 12px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:1px;\">Pricing Breakdown</h2>\n          <table width=\"100%\" cellpadding=\"0\" cellspacing=\"0\" style=\"border-collapse:collapse;background:#111530;border-radius:8px;overflow:hidden;\">\n            ${row('Base Implementation', fmt(data.baseCost))}\n            ${row('AI Features', fmt(data.aiCost))}\n            ${row('ERP Modules', fmt(data.modCost))}\n            ${row('Implementation Support', fmt(data.supportCost))}\n            ${data.includeRetainer ? row('Operations Retainer', fmt(data.retainerCost)) : ''}\n            ${row('Subtotal', fmt(data.subtotal))}\n            ${row('VAT (5%)', fmt(data.vat))}\n            ${row('TOTAL', fmt(data.total), true)}\n          </table>\n        </td></tr>\n\n        <!-- Features & Modules -->\n        <tr><td style=\"padding:0 32px 24px;\">\n          <table width=\"100%\" cellpadding=\"0\" cellspacing=\"0\">\n            <tr>\n              <td width=\"48%\" valign=\"top\" style=\"padding-right:12px;\">\n                <h3 style=\"font-size:13px;color:#00d9ff;margin:0 0 10px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:1px;\">AI Features</h3>\n                <ul style=\"margin:0;padding:0 0 0 16px;\">${featureList}</ul>\n              </td>\n              <td width=\"4%\"></td>\n              <td width=\"48%\" valign=\"top\">\n                <h3 style=\"font-size:13px;color:#00d9ff;margin:0 0 10px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:1px;\">ERP Modules</h3>\n                <ul style=\"margin:0;padding:0 0 0 16px;\">${moduleList}</ul>\n              </td>\n            </tr>\n          </table>\n        </td></tr>\n\n        <!-- CTA -->\n        <tr><td style=\"padding:0 32px 32px;text-align:center;\">\n          <a href=\"https://app.cal.com/sgctech\" style=\"display:inline-block;background:#00d9ff;color:#0b0e27;font-weight:bold;font-size:14px;padding:14px 32px;border-radius:6px;text-decoration:none;\">Book a Discovery Call</a>\n          <p style=\"margin:16px 0 0;font-size:12px;color:#b4bed2;\">This quote is valid for 30 days. Reply to this email with any questions.</p>\n        </td></tr>\n\n        <!-- Footer -->\n        <tr><td style=\"padding:20px 32px;border-top:1px solid #1a2044;text-align:center;\">\n          <p style=\"margin:0;font-size:11px;color:#4a5568;\">SGC TECH AI · sgctech.ai · enterprise@sgctechai.com · UAE VAT Registered</p>\n          <p style=\"margin:6px 0 0;font-size:11px;color:#4a5568;\">You received this because you requested a quote at sgctech.ai/quote-builder</p>\n        </td></tr>\n\n      </table>\n    </td></tr>\n  </table>\n</body></html>`\n}\n\nexport interface NotificationEmailData {\n  company: string\n  email: string\n  mobile: string\n  quoteNumber: string\n  industryName: string\n  total: number\n  days: number\n  aiFeatureNames: string[]\n  moduleNames: string[]\n}\n\nexport function buildNotificationEmailHtml(data: NotificationEmailData): string {\n  return `<!DOCTYPE html>\n<html lang=\"en\">\n<head><meta charset=\"utf-8\"></head>\n<body style=\"font-family:Arial,sans-serif;background:#f5f5f5;padding:24px;\">\n  <div style=\"max-width:560px;background:#fff;border-radius:8px;padding:28px;border:1px solid #ddd;\">\n    <h2 style=\"margin:0 0 16px;color:#0b0e27;\">🔔 New Quote Request — ${data.quoteNumber}</h2>\n    <table cellpadding=\"0\" cellspacing=\"0\" style=\"width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;font-size:14px;\">\n      <tr><td style=\"padding:8px 0;color:#555;width:140px;\">Company</td><td style=\"padding:8px 0;font-weight:bold;\">${data.company}</td></tr>\n      <tr><td style=\"padding:8px 0;color:#555;\">Email</td><td style=\"padding:8px 0;\"><a href=\"mailto:${data.email}\">${data.email}</a></td></tr>\n      <tr><td style=\"padding:8px 0;color:#555;\">Mobile</td><td style=\"padding:8px 0;\">${data.mobile}</td></tr>\n      <tr><td style=\"padding:8px 0;color:#555;\">Industry</td><td style=\"padding:8px 0;\">${data.industryName}</td></tr>\n      <tr><td style=\"padding:8px 0;color:#555;\">Quote Total</td><td style=\"padding:8px 0;font-weight:bold;color:#0b0e27;\">AED ${data.total.toLocaleString()}</td></tr>\n      <tr><td style=\"padding:8px 0;color:#555;\">Deploy Days</td><td style=\"padding:8px 0;\">${data.days} days</td></tr>\n      <tr><td style=\"padding:8px 0;color:#555;\">AI Features</td><td style=\"padding:8px 0;\">${data.aiFeatureNames.join(', ') || '—'}</td></tr>\n      <tr><td style=\"padding:8px 0;color:#555;\">ERP Modules</td><td style=\"padding:8px 0;\">${data.moduleNames.join(', ') || '—'}</td></tr>\n    </table>\n    <hr style=\"margin:20px 0;border:none;border-top:1px solid #eee;\">\n    <p style=\"margin:0;font-size:12px;color:#999;\">Sent by SGC TECH AI Quote Builder · sgctech.ai · Odoo sync triggered separately</p>\n  </div>\n</body></html>`\n}\n```\n\n### 4. CREATE `src/routes/api.ts`\n\n```typescript\nimport { Hono } from 'hono'\nimport { validateEmail, VALIDATION_MESSAGES } from '../utils/email-validator'\nimport { sendEmail, SmtpConfig } from '../utils/smtp'\nimport { createOdooLead } from '../utils/odoo'\nimport { buildCustomerEmailHtml, buildNotificationEmailHtml } from '../utils/email-templates'\nimport { INDUSTRIES, AI_FEATURES, ODOO_MODULES } from '../data/quote-data'\n\nconst api = new Hono()\n\n/* ── Helpers ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */\n\nfunction getSmtpConfig(env: Record<string, string>): SmtpConfig {\n  return {\n    host: 'smtppro.zoho.com',\n    port: 465,\n    user: 'hello@scholarixglobal.com',\n    pass: env.SMTP_PASS || '',\n    fromName: 'SGC TECH AI',\n  }\n}\n\nasync function rateLimitKv(\n  kv: KVNamespace,\n  key: string,\n  windowSec: number,\n  maxHits: number\n): Promise<boolean> {\n  const raw = await kv.get(key)\n  const count = raw ? parseInt(raw, 10) : 0\n  if (count >= maxHits) return false\n  await kv.put(key, String(count + 1), { expirationTtl: windowSec })\n  return true\n}\n\nfunction serverRecomputeQuote(\n  industryId: string,\n  aiFeatureIds: string[],\n  moduleIds: string[],\n  includeRetainer: boolean\n) {\n  const ind = INDUSTRIES.find(i => i.id === industryId)\n  if (!ind) return null\n\n  const aiCost = aiFeatureIds.reduce((s, id) => {\n    const f = AI_FEATURES.find(f => f.id === id)\n    return s + (f ? f.cost : 0)\n  }, 0)\n\n  const modCost = moduleIds.reduce((s, id) => {\n    const m = ODOO_MODULES.find(m => m.id === id)\n    return s + (m ? m.cost : 0)\n  }, 0)\n\n  const totalSel = aiFeatureIds.length + moduleIds.length\n  const days = Math.ceil(ind.avgDeploymentDays * (1 + (totalSel / 10) * 0.15))\n  const supportCost = days * 800\n  const retainerCost = includeRetainer ? 8000 : 0\n  const subtotal = ind.baseCost + aiCost + modCost + supportCost + retainerCost\n  const vat = Math.round(subtotal * 0.05)\n  const total = subtotal + vat\n\n  const goLive = new Date()\n  goLive.setDate(goLive.getDate() + days)\n\n  const aiFeatureNames = aiFeatureIds\n    .map(id => AI_FEATURES.find(f => f.id === id)?.name)\n    .filter(Boolean) as string[]\n\n  const moduleNames = moduleIds\n    .map(id => ODOO_MODULES.find(m => m.id === id)?.name)\n    .filter(Boolean) as string[]\n\n  return {\n    industry: ind,\n    aiCost, modCost, supportCost, retainerCost,\n    subtotal, vat, total, days,\n    goLiveDate: goLive.toLocaleDateString('en-AE', { day: 'numeric', month: 'short', year: 'numeric' }),\n    aiFeatureNames,\n    moduleNames,\n  }\n}\n\n/* ── POST /api/validate-email ────────────────────────────────────── */\napi.post('/validate-email', async (c) => {\n  const env = c.env as Record<string, string> & { AIRA_BRAIN_KV: KVNamespace }\n  const ip = c.req.header('CF-Connecting-IP') || 'unknown'\n\n  const allowed = await rateLimitKv(env.AIRA_BRAIN_KV, `rl:ve:${ip}`, 60, 10)\n  if (!allowed) {\n    return c.json({ valid: false, reason: 'rate_limited', message: 'Too many requests. Please wait a moment.' }, 429)\n  }\n\n  let body: { email?: string }\n  try { body = await c.req.json() } catch { return c.json({ valid: false, message: 'Invalid request body' }, 400) }\n\n  const { email } = body\n  if (!email || typeof email !== 'string') {\n    return c.json({ valid: false, message: 'Email is required' }, 400)\n  }\n\n  const result = validateEmail(email.trim())\n  if (!result.valid) {\n    return c.json({ valid: false, message: VALIDATION_MESSAGES[result.reason] || 'Invalid email.' })\n  }\n\n  // Issue a short-lived token after successful validation\n  const token = crypto.randomUUID()\n  await env.AIRA_BRAIN_KV.put(`qt:${token}`, email.trim().toLowerCase(), { expirationTtl: 600 })\n\n  return c.json({ valid: true, token })\n})\n\n/* ── POST /api/send-quote ────────────────────────────────────────── */\napi.post('/send-quote', async (c) => {\n  const env = c.env as Record<string, string> & { AIRA_BRAIN_KV: KVNamespace }\n  const ip = c.req.header('CF-Connecting-IP') || 'unknown'\n\n  const allowed = await rateLimitKv(env.AIRA_BRAIN_KV, `rl:sq:${ip}`, 60, 3)\n  if (!allowed) {\n    return c.json({ success: false, message: 'Too many requests. Please try again shortly.' }, 429)\n  }\n\n  let body: {\n    company?: string; email?: string; mobile?: string; _hp?: string\n    industryId?: string; aiFeatureIds?: string[]; moduleIds?: string[]\n    includeRetainer?: boolean; token?: string\n  }\n  try { body = await c.req.json() } catch { return c.json({ success: false, message: 'Invalid request' }, 400) }\n\n  // Honeypot — bots fill this hidden field\n  if (body._hp) return c.json({ success: false, message: 'Invalid submission' }, 400)\n\n  const { company, email, mobile, industryId, aiFeatureIds = [], moduleIds = [], includeRetainer = false, token } = body\n\n  // Validate required fields\n  if (!company?.trim() || !email?.trim() || !mobile?.trim() || !industryId) {\n    return c.json({ success: false, message: 'Company, email, mobile and industry are required.' }, 400)\n  }\n\n  // Verify token (issued by /validate-email)\n  if (!token) return c.json({ success: false, message: 'Email verification required.' }, 400)\n  const tokenEmail = await env.AIRA_BRAIN_KV.get(`qt:${token}`)\n  if (!tokenEmail || tokenEmail !== email.trim().toLowerCase()) {\n    // Re-validate server-side as fallback (token may have expired)\n    const recheck = validateEmail(email.trim())\n    if (!recheck.valid) {\n      return c.json({ success: false, message: VALIDATION_MESSAGES[(recheck as { valid: false; reason: string }).reason] || 'Invalid email.' }, 400)\n    }\n  }\n\n  // Server-side pricing recompute (never trust client totals)\n  const quote = serverRecomputeQuote(industryId, aiFeatureIds, moduleIds, includeRetainer)\n  if (!quote) return c.json({ success: false, message: 'Invalid industry selection.' }, 400)\n\n  const quoteNumber = 'SGC-' + Date.now().toString().slice(-6)\n  const smtp = getSmtpConfig(env)\n  const notificationEmail = env.NOTIFICATION_EMAIL || 'info@sgctech.ai'\n\n  // Send customer email\n  const customerHtml = buildCustomerEmailHtml(email, {\n    company: company.trim(),\n    mobile: mobile.trim(),\n    quoteNumber,\n    industryName: quote.industry.name,\n    baseCost: quote.industry.baseCost,\n    aiCost: quote.aiCost,\n    modCost: quote.modCost,\n    supportCost: quote.supportCost,\n    retainerCost: quote.retainerCost,\n    subtotal: quote.subtotal,\n    vat: quote.vat,\n    total: quote.total,\n    days: quote.days,\n    goLiveDate: quote.goLiveDate,\n    aiFeatureNames: quote.aiFeatureNames,\n    moduleNames: quote.moduleNames,\n    includeRetainer,\n  })\n\n  try {\n    await sendEmail(smtp, {\n      to: email.trim(),\n      subject: `Your SGC TECH AI Quote — ${quoteNumber}`,\n      html: customerHtml,\n    })\n  } catch (err) {\n    console.error('SMTP send error (customer):', err)\n    return c.json({ success: false, message: 'Failed to send email. Please try again.' }, 500)\n  }\n\n  // Invalidate token (single-use)\n  if (token) await env.AIRA_BRAIN_KV.delete(`qt:${token}`)\n\n  // Non-blocking: send notification to SGC team\n  const notifHtml = buildNotificationEmailHtml({\n    company: company.trim(),\n    email: email.trim(),\n    mobile: mobile.trim(),\n    quoteNumber,\n    industryName: quote.industry.name,\n    total: quote.total,\n    days: quote.days,\n    aiFeatureNames: quote.aiFeatureNames,\n    moduleNames: quote.moduleNames,\n  })\n\n  // Fire-and-forget notification (don't block response)\n  sendEmail(smtp, {\n    to: notificationEmail,\n    subject: `[Lead] ${quoteNumber} — ${company.trim()} (AED ${quote.total.toLocaleString()})`,\n    html: notifHtml,\n  }).catch(err => console.error('SMTP send error (notification):', err))\n\n  // Non-blocking: Odoo CRM lead sync\n  if (env.ODOO_API_KEY) {\n    createOdooLead(\n      {\n        url: env.ODOO_URL || 'https://scholarixglobal.com',\n        db: env.ODOO_DB || 'scholarixglobal',\n        user: env.ODOO_USER || 'info@scholarixglobal.com',\n        apiKey: env.ODOO_API_KEY,\n      },\n      {\n        company: company.trim(),\n        email: email.trim(),\n        mobile: mobile.trim(),\n        industryName: quote.industry.name,\n        quoteNumber,\n        totalAmount: quote.total,\n        features: quote.aiFeatureNames,\n        modules: quote.moduleNames,\n      }\n    ).catch(err => console.error('Odoo sync error:', err))\n  }\n\n  return c.json({ success: true, quoteNumber })\n})\n\nexport default api\n```\n\n### 5. UPDATE `src/index.tsx`\n\nAfter line 18 (`app.route('/quote-builder', quoteBuilderApp)`), add:\n```typescript\nimport apiApp from './routes/api'\n```\nat the top (after the quoteBuilderApp import) and:\n```typescript\napp.route('/api', apiApp)\n```\nright after `app.route('/quote-builder', quoteBuilderApp)`.\n\n### 6. UPDATE `src/routes/quote-builder.tsx` — replace the modal section (lines 285–315)\n\nReplace the entire modal div (`<!-- Customer Info Modal -->` through `</div><!-- /qb-modal -->`) with:\n\n```tsx\n{/* ── Lead Capture Modal ── */}\n<div class=\"qb-modal-overlay\" id=\"qb-modal\" aria-modal=\"true\" role=\"dialog\" aria-labelledby=\"qb-modal-title\" hidden>\n  <div class=\"qb-modal-card glass\">\n    <button class=\"qb-modal-close\" id=\"qb-modal-close\" type=\"button\" aria-label=\"Close\"><QbIcon name=\"x\" size={18} /></button>\n    <h3 class=\"qb-modal-title\" id=\"qb-modal-title\">Get Your Quote</h3>\n    <p class=\"qb-modal-sub\">Enter your details to download or email your personalised proposal.</p>\n\n    {/* Honeypot — hidden from humans, bots fill it */}\n    <div style=\"display:none;position:absolute;left:-9999px;\" aria-hidden=\"true\">\n      <input type=\"text\" id=\"qb-hp\" name=\"website\" tabindex={-1} autocomplete=\"off\" />\n    </div>\n\n    <div class=\"qb-field\">\n      <label for=\"qb-company\">Company Name <span class=\"qb-required\">*</span></label>\n      <input type=\"text\" id=\"qb-company\" placeholder=\"e.g. Meridian Holdings\" autocomplete=\"organization\" />\n    </div>\n    <div class=\"qb-field\">\n      <label for=\"qb-email\">Work Email <span class=\"qb-required\">*</span></label>\n      <div class=\"qb-email-wrap\">\n        <input type=\"email\" id=\"qb-email\" placeholder=\"you@company.com\" autocomplete=\"email\" />\n        <span id=\"qb-email-status\" class=\"qb-email-status\" aria-live=\"polite\"></span>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n    <div class=\"qb-field\">\n      <label for=\"qb-mobile\">Mobile <span class=\"qb-required\">*</span></label>\n      <input type=\"tel\" id=\"qb-mobile\" placeholder=\"+971 50 123 4567\" autocomplete=\"tel\" />\n    </div>\n\n    <div id=\"qb-modal-error\" class=\"qb-modal-error\" hidden></div>\n    <div id=\"qb-email-success\" class=\"qb-email-success\" hidden>\n      <svg width=\"20\" height=\"20\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"currentColor\" stroke-width=\"2\"><polyline points=\"20 6 9 17 4 12\"/></svg>\n      Quote sent! Check your inbox (and spam folder just in case).\n    </div>\n\n    <div class=\"qb-modal-actions\">\n      <button class=\"btn btn-ghost\" id=\"qb-modal-cancel\" type=\"button\">Cancel</button>\n      <button class=\"btn btn-secondary\" id=\"qb-modal-download\" type=\"button\">\n        <QbIcon name=\"download\" size={16} />\n        Download PDF\n      </button>\n      <button class=\"btn btn-primary\" id=\"qb-modal-email\" type=\"button\">\n        <QbIcon name=\"mail\" size={16} />\n        Email Me This Quote\n      </button>\n    </div>\n  </div>\n</div>\n```\n\nNote: You need to add a `mail` case to the `QbIcon` component. Look for the `QbIcon` function/component in `quote-builder.tsx` and add:\n```\ncase 'mail': return <svg width={size} height={size} viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"currentColor\" stroke-width=\"2\" stroke-linecap=\"round\" stroke-linejoin=\"round\"><rect x=\"2\" y=\"4\" width=\"20\" height=\"16\" rx=\"2\"/><path d=\"m22 7-8.97 5.7a1.94 1.94 0 0 1-2.06 0L2 7\"/></svg>\n```\n\n### 7. err.textContent = '' }\n}\n\nasync function validateEmailField() {\n  const email = $('qb-email')?.value.trim()\n  if (!email) { setEmailStatus('', ''); emailToken = null; return false }\n\n  setEmailStatus('checking', 'Checking…')\n  emailValidating = true\n  try {\n    const res = await fetch('/api/validate-email', {\n      method: 'POST',\n      headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },\n      body: JSON.stringify({ email }),\n    })\n    const data = await res.json()\n    if (data.valid) {\n      emailToken = data.token\n      setEmailStatus('valid', '✓ Valid')\n      return true\n    } else {\n      emailToken = null\n      setEmailStatus('error', data.message || 'Invalid email')\n      return false\n    }\n  } catch {\n    setEmailStatus('error', 'Could not verify email')\n    return false\n  } finally {\n    emailValidating = false\n  }\n}\n\nasync function sendQuoteEmail() {\n  const company = $('qb-company')?.value.trim()\n  const email = $('qb-email')?.value.trim()\n  const mobile = $('qb-mobile')?.value.trim()\n  const hp = $('qb-hp')?.value || ''\n\n  if (!company || !email || !mobile) {\n    showModalError('Please fill in all required fields.')\n    return\n  }\n\n  const emailBtn = $('qb-modal-email')\n  if (emailBtn) {\n    emailBtn.disabled = true\n    emailBtn.textContent = 'Sending…'\n  }\n  clearModalError()\n\n  // Ensure email is validated\n  if (!emailToken) {\n    const ok = await validateEmailField()\n    if (!ok) {\n      if (emailBtn) { emailBtn.disabled = false; emailBtn.innerHTML = '<svg width=\"16\" height=\"16\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"currentColor\" stroke-width=\"2\"><rect x=\"2\" y=\"4\" width=\"20\" height=\"16\" rx=\"2\"/><path d=\"m22 7-8.97 5.7a1.94 1.94 0 0 1-2.06 0L2 7\"/></svg> Email Me This Quote' }\n      return\n    }\n  }\n\n  try {\n    const res = await fetch('/api/send-quote', {\n      method: 'POST',\n      headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },\n      body: JSON.stringify({\n        company, email, mobile, _hp: hp,\n        industryId: state.industryId,\n        aiFeatureIds: [...state.aiFeatures],\n        moduleIds: [...state.modules],\n        includeRetainer: state.includeRetainer,\n        token: emailToken,\n      }),\n    })\n    const data = await res.json()\n    if (data.success) {\n      emailToken = null\n      const success = $('qb-email-success')\n      if (success) success.hidden = false\n      const actions = document.querySelector('.qb-modal-actions')\n      if (actions) actions.style.display = 'none'\n    } else {\n      showModalError(data.message || 'Failed to send quote. ### 1. CREATE `src/utils/smtp.ts`
````

Minimal SMTP-over-TLS client for Cloudflare Workers using `cloudflare:sockets`:

```typescript
/**
 * Minimal SMTP-over-TLS (implicit SSL, port 465) client for Cloudflare Workers.
 * Uses cloudflare:sockets for raw TCP with TLS. 
 * Sends HTML emails via Zoho SMTP (smtppro.zoho.com:465).
 */
// @ts-ignore — cloudflare:sockets is a CF Workers runtime module
import { connect } from 'cloudflare:sockets'

export interface SmtpConfig {
  host: string
  port: number
  user: string    // SMTP username (= from address)
  pass: string    // SMTP app password
  fromName?: string
}

export interface EmailMessage {
  to: string | string[]
  subject: string
  html: string
  text?: string
}

/** Send an HTML email via Zoho SMTP over TLS (port 465) */
export async function sendEmail(config: SmtpConfig, msg: EmailMessage): Promise<void> {
  const toList = Array.isArray(msg.to) ? msg.to : [msg.to]
  const fromDisplay = config.fromName
    ? `"${config.fromName}" <${config.user}>`
    : config.user

  // Build MIME multipart/alternative message
  const boundary = `----=_Part_${Date.now().toString(36)}_${Math.random().toString(36).slice(2)}`
  const subjectB64 = `=?utf-8?B?${btoa(unescape(encodeURIComponent(msg.subject)))}?=`
  const plainText = msg.text || msg.html.replace(/<[^>]+>/g, '').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim()

  const mimeLines = [
    `From: ${fromDisplay}`,
    `To: ${toList.join(', ')}`,
    `Subject: ${subjectB64}`,
    `MIME-Version: 1.0`,
    `Content-Type: multipart/alternative; boundary="${boundary}"`,
    ``,
    `--${boundary}`,
    `Content-Type: text/plain; charset=utf-8`,
    `Content-Transfer-Encoding: base64`,
    ``,
    btoa(unescape(encodeURIComponent(plainText))),
    ``,
    `--${boundary}`,
    `Content-Type: text/html; charset=utf-8`,
    `Content-Transfer-Encoding: base64`,
    ``,
    btoa(unescape(encodeURIComponent(msg.html))),
    ``,
    `--${boundary}--`,
  ]

  // Dot-stuffing: lines starting with '.' need a leading extra '.'
  const mimeBody = mimeLines
    .map(line => (line === '.' ? '..' : line.startsWith('.') ? '.' + line : line))
    .join('\r\n')

  // Open TCP socket with immediate TLS (implicit SSL, port 465)
  // @ts-ignore
  const socket = connect(
    { hostname: config.host, port: config.port },
    { secureTransport: 'on' }
  )

  const enc = new TextEncoder()
  const dec = new TextDecoder()
  let buf = ''

  const reader = socket.readable.getReader()
  const writer = socket.writable.getWriter()

  /** Read from socket, accumulating into `buf`, extract one complete SMTP response */
  async function readResponse(): Promise<{ code: number; text: string }> {
    const lines: string[] = []
    while (true) {
      // Try to pull a complete line from buffer
      let nlIdx = buf.indexOf('\n')
      while (nlIdx < 0) {
        const { value, done } = await reader.read()
        if (done) throw new Error('SMTP: connection closed unexpectedly')
        buf += dec.decode(value)
        nlIdx = buf.indexOf('\n')
      }
      const line = buf.slice(0, nlIdx).replace(/\r$/, '')
      buf = buf.slice(nlIdx + 1)
      lines.push(line)
      // Multi-line response: "CODE-text" is continuation; "CODE text" is last line
      if (line.length < 4 || line[3] === ' ') {
        const code = parseInt(line.slice(0, 3), 10)
        return { code, text: lines.join('\n') }
      }
    }
  }

  async function cmd(command: string): Promise<{ code: number; text: string }> {
    await writer.write(enc.encode(command + '\r\n'))
    return readResponse()
  }

  async function expect(command: string, expectedCode: number): Promise<void> {
    const resp = await cmd(command)
    if (resp.code !== expectedCode) {
      throw new Error(`SMTP error after "${command.split(' ')[0]}": expected ${expectedCode}, got ${resp.code}\n${resp.text}`)
    }
  }

  try {
    // Greeting
    const greeting = await readResponse()
    if (greeting.code !== 220) throw new Error(`SMTP: unexpected greeting ${greeting.code}`)

    // EHLO
    await expect(`EHLO ${config.host}`, 250)

    // AUTH LOGIN
    const authStart = await cmd('AUTH LOGIN')
    if (authStart.code !== 334) throw new Error(`SMTP: AUTH LOGIN failed: ${authStart.text}`)

    const authUser = await cmd(btoa(config.user))
    if (authUser.code !== 334) throw new Error(`SMTP: auth user step failed: ${authUser.text}`)

    const authPass = await cmd(btoa(config.pass))
    if (authPass.code !== 235) throw new Error(`SMTP: authentication failed: ${authPass.text}`)

    // Envelope
    await expect(`MAIL FROM:<${config.user}>`, 250)
    for (const to of toList) {
      await expect(`RCPT TO:<${to}>`, 250)
    }

    // DATA
    const dataResp = await cmd('DATA')
    if (dataResp.code !== 354) throw new Error(`SMTP: DATA rejected: ${dataResp.text}`)

    // Message body — terminate with \r\n.\r\n
    await writer.write(enc.encode(mimeBody + '\r\n.\r\n'))
    const sendResult = await readResponse()
    if (sendResult.code !== 250) throw new Error(`SMTP: message rejected: ${sendResult.text}`)

    // Quit
    await writer.write(enc.encode('QUIT\r\n'))
    await readResponse().catch(() => {}) // ignore quit response errors

  } finally {
    try { await writer.close() } catch { /* ignore */ }
    try { await socket.close() } catch { /* ignore */ }
  }
}
```

### 2. CREATE `src/utils/odoo.ts`

Odoo JSON-RPC CRM lead creation:

```typescript
/**
 * Odoo JSON-RPC client for creating CRM leads.
 * Uses Odoo's /jsonrpc endpoint with API key authentication.
 * 
 * Setup: Generate an API key in Odoo → Settings → Technical → API Keys
 * Set as Cloudflare secret: wrangler secret put ODOO_API_KEY
 */

export interface OdooConfig {
  url: string         // e.g. https://scholarixglobal.com
  db: string          // e.g. scholarixglobal
  user: string        // login email
  apiKey: string      // API key from Odoo settings
}

export interface LeadData {
  company: string
  email: string
  mobile: string
  industryName: string
  quoteNumber: string
  totalAmount: number
  features: string[]
  modules: string[]
}

async function jsonRpc(url: string, service: string, method: string, args: unknown[]): Promise<unknown> {
  const res = await fetch(`${url}/jsonrpc`, {
    method: 'POST',
    headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
    body: JSON.stringify({
      jsonrpc: '2.0',
      method: 'call',
      id: Date.now(),
      params: { service, method, args },
    }),
  })
  if (!res.ok) throw new Error(`Odoo HTTP error: ${res.status}`)
  const data = await res.json() as { result?: unknown; error?: { message: string } }
  if (data.error) throw new Error(`Odoo RPC error: ${data.error.message}`)
  return data.result
}

/** Create a CRM lead in Odoo. Returns the new lead ID, or throws on failure. */
export async function createOdooLead(config: OdooConfig, lead: LeadData): Promise<number> {
  // Authenticate to get uid
  const uid = await jsonRpc(config.url, 'common', 'authenticate', [
    config.db, config.user, config.apiKey, {},
  ]) as number

  if (!uid) throw new Error('Odoo: authentication failed — check credentials')

  // Build description
  const description = [
    `Quote Reference: ${lead.quoteNumber}`,
    `Industry: ${lead.industryName}`,
    `Total Amount: AED ${lead.totalAmount.toLocaleString()}`,
    ``,
    `AI Features: ${lead.features.length > 0 ? lead.features.join(', ') : 'None'}`,
    `ERP Modules: ${lead.modules.length > 0 ? lead.modules.join(', ') : 'None'}`,
    ``,
    `Source: SGC TECH AI Quote Builder (sgctech.ai/quote-builder)`,
  ].join('\n')

  // Create lead
  const leadId = await jsonRpc(config.url, 'object', 'execute_kw', [
    config.db, uid, config.apiKey,
    'crm.lead', 'create',
    [{
      name: `[${lead.quoteNumber}] ${lead.company} — ${lead.industryName}`,
      partner_name: lead.company,
      email_from: lead.email,
      mobile: lead.mobile,
      description,
      type: 'lead',
      source_id: false,
      tag_ids: [],
    }],
  ]) as number

  return leadId
}
```

### 3. CREATE `src/utils/email-templates.ts`

HTML email templates for customer quote and internal notification:

```typescript
/**
 * HTML email templates for the SGC TECH AI quote builder.
 * Dark navy brand theme consistent with the website.
 */

export interface QuoteEmailData {
  company: string
  mobile: string
  quoteNumber: string
  industryName: string
  baseCost: number
  aiCost: number
  modCost: number
  supportCost: number
  retainerCost: number
  subtotal: number
  vat: number
  total: number
  days: number
  goLiveDate: string
  aiFeatureNames: string[]
  moduleNames: string[]
  includeRetainer: boolean
}

function fmt(n: number): string {
  return 'AED ' + n.toLocaleString('en-AE')
}

function row(label: string, value: string, highlight = false): string {
  const bg = highlight ? '#0d3b4a' : 'transparent'
  const color = highlight ? '#00d9ff' : '#b4bed2'
  const weight = highlight ? 'bold' : 'normal'
  return `
    <tr>
      <td style="padding:8px 12px;background:${bg};color:${color};font-weight:${weight};">${label}</td>
      <td style="padding:8px 12px;background:${bg};color:${color};font-weight:${weight};text-align:right;">${value}</td>
    </tr>`
}

export function buildCustomerEmailHtml(email: string, data: QuoteEmailData): string {
  const featureList = data.aiFeatureNames.length
    ? data.aiFeatureNames.map(f => `<li style="margin:4px 0;color:#b4bed2;">${f}</li>`).join('')
    : '<li style="color:#b4bed2;">None selected</li>'

  const moduleList = data.moduleNames.length
    ? data.moduleNames.map(m => `<li style="margin:4px 0;color:#b4bed2;">${m}</li>`).join('')
    : '<li style="color:#b4bed2;">None selected</li>'

  return `<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head><meta charset="utf-8"><meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1"></head>
<body style="margin:0;padding:0;background:#070a1a;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;">
  <table width="100%" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" style="background:#070a1a;padding:32px 16px;">
    <tr><td align="center">
      <table width="600" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" style="max-width:600px;width:100%;background:#0b0e27;border:1px solid #1a2044;border-radius:12px;overflow:hidden;">

        <!-- Header -->
        <tr><td style="background:#0b0e27;padding:32px 32px 16px;border-bottom:2px solid #00d9ff;">
          <table width="100%"><tr>
            <td><span style="font-size:20px;font-weight:bold;color:#00d9ff;letter-spacing:1px;">SGC TECH AI</span>
              <div style="font-size:11px;color:#b4bed2;margin-top:2px;">Enterprise AI &amp; ERP Solutions</div></td>
            <td align="right"><span style="font-size:11px;color:#b4bed2;">${data.quoteNumber}</span></td>
          </tr></table>
        </td></tr>

        <!-- Greeting -->
        <tr><td style="padding:28px 32px 12px;">
          <h1 style="margin:0 0 8px;font-size:22px;color:#ffffff;">Your Custom Quote is Ready</h1>
          <p style="margin:0;color:#b4bed2;font-size:14px;line-height:1.6;">
            Hi ${data.company}, thank you for using the SGC TECH AI Quote Builder.
            Below is your personalised implementation proposal for the <strong style="color:#00d9ff;">${data.industryName}</strong> industry.
          </p>
        </td></tr>

        <!-- Total highlight -->
        <tr><td style="padding:0 32px 24px;">
          <div style="background:#0d3b4a;border:1px solid #00d9ff;border-radius:8px;padding:20px 24px;text-align:center;">
            <div style="font-size:12px;color:#b4bed2;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:1px;margin-bottom:6px;">Total Investment (inc. 5% VAT)</div>
            <div style="font-size:32px;font-weight:bold;color:#00d9ff;">${fmt(data.total)}</div>
            <div style="font-size:12px;color:#b4bed2;margin-top:6px;">Est. Go-Live: ${data.goLiveDate} · ${data.days} working days</div>
          </div>
        </td></tr>

        <!-- Pricing breakdown -->
        <tr><td style="padding:0 32px 24px;">
          <h2 style="font-size:14px;color:#ffffff;margin:0 0 12px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:1px;">Pricing Breakdown</h2>
          <table width="100%" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" style="border-collapse:collapse;background:#111530;border-radius:8px;overflow:hidden;">
            ${row('Base Implementation', fmt(data.baseCost))}
            ${row('AI Features', fmt(data.aiCost))}
            ${row('ERP Modules', fmt(data.modCost))}
            ${row('Implementation Support', fmt(data.supportCost))}
            ${data.includeRetainer ? row('Operations Retainer', fmt(data.retainerCost)) : ''}
            ${row('Subtotal', fmt(data.subtotal))}
            ${row('VAT (5%)', fmt(data.vat))}
            ${row('TOTAL', fmt(data.total), true)}
          </table>
        </td></tr>

        <!-- Features & Modules -->
        <tr><td style="padding:0 32px 24px;">
          <table width="100%" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0">
            <tr>
              <td width="48%" valign="top" style="padding-right:12px;">
                <h3 style="font-size:13px;color:#00d9ff;margin:0 0 10px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:1px;">AI Features</h3>
                <ul style="margin:0;padding:0 0 0 16px;">${featureList}</ul>
              </td>
              <td width="4%"></td>
              <td width="48%" valign="top">
                <h3 style="font-size:13px;color:#00d9ff;margin:0 0 10px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:1px;">ERP Modules</h3>
                <ul style="margin:0;padding:0 0 0 16px;">${moduleList}</ul>
              </td>
            </tr>
          </table>
        </td></tr>

        <!-- CTA -->
        <tr><td style="padding:0 32px 32px;text-align:center;">
          <a href="https://app.cal.com/sgctech" style="display:inline-block;background:#00d9ff;color:#0b0e27;font-weight:bold;font-size:14px;padding:14px 32px;border-radius:6px;text-decoration:none;">Book a Discovery Call</a>
          <p style="margin:16px 0 0;font-size:12px;color:#b4bed2;">This quote is valid for 30 days. Reply to this email with any questions.</p>
        </td></tr>

        <!-- Footer -->
        <tr><td style="padding:20px 32px;border-top:1px solid #1a2044;text-align:center;">
          <p style="margin:0;font-size:11px;color:#4a5568;">SGC TECH AI · sgctech.ai · enterprise@sgctechai.com · UAE VAT Registered</p>
          <p style="margin:6px 0 0;font-size:11px;color:#4a5568;">You received this because you requested a quote at sgctech.ai/quote-builder</p>
        </td></tr>

      </table>
    </td></tr>
  </table>
</body></html>`
}

export interface NotificationEmailData {
  company: string
  email: string
  mobile: string
  quoteNumber: string
  industryName: string
  total: number
  days: number
  aiFeatureNames: string[]
  moduleNames: string[]
}

export function buildNotificationEmailHtml(data: NotificationEmailData): string {
  return `<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head><meta charset="utf-8"></head>
<body style="font-family:Arial,sans-serif;background:#f5f5f5;padding:24px;">
  <div style="max-width:560px;background:#fff;border-radius:8px;padding:28px;border:1px solid #ddd;">
    <h2 style="margin:0 0 16px;color:#0b0e27;">🔔 New Quote Request — ${data.quoteNumber}</h2>
    <table cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" style="width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;font-size:14px;">
      <tr><td style="padding:8px 0;color:#555;width:140px;">Company</td><td style="padding:8px 0;font-weight:bold;">${data.company}</td></tr>
      <tr><td style="padding:8px 0;color:#555;">Email</td><td style="padding:8px 0;"><a href="mailto:${data.email}">${data.email}</a></td></tr>
      <tr><td style="padding:8px 0;color:#555;">Mobile</td><td style="padding:8px 0;">${data.mobile}</td></tr>
      <tr><td style="padding:8px 0;color:#555;">Industry</td><td style="padding:8px 0;">${data.industryName}</td></tr>
      <tr><td style="padding:8px 0;color:#555;">Quote Total</td><td style="padding:8px 0;font-weight:bold;color:#0b0e27;">AED ${data.total.toLocaleString()}</td></tr>
      <tr><td style="padding:8px 0;color:#555;">Deploy Days</td><td style="padding:8px 0;">${data.days} days</td></tr>
      <tr><td style="padding:8px 0;color:#555;">AI Features</td><td style="padding:8px 0;">${data.aiFeatureNames.join(', ') || '—'}</td></tr>
      <tr><td style="padding:8px 0;color:#555;">ERP Modules</td><td style="padding:8px 0;">${data.moduleNames.join(', ') || '—'}</td></tr>
    </table>
    <hr style="margin:20px 0;border:none;border-top:1px solid #eee;">
    <p style="margin:0;font-size:12px;color:#999;">Sent by SGC TECH AI Quote Builder · sgctech.ai · Odoo sync triggered separately</p>
  </div>
</body></html>`
}
```

### 4. CREATE `src/routes/api.ts`

```typescript
import { Hono } from 'hono'
import { validateEmail, VALIDATION_MESSAGES } from '../utils/email-validator'
import { sendEmail, SmtpConfig } from '../utils/smtp'
import { createOdooLead } from '../utils/odoo'
import { buildCustomerEmailHtml, buildNotificationEmailHtml } from '../utils/email-templates'
import { INDUSTRIES, AI_FEATURES, ODOO_MODULES } from '../data/quote-data'

const api = new Hono()

/* ── Helpers ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */

function getSmtpConfig(env: Record<string, string>): SmtpConfig {
  return {
    host: 'smtppro.zoho.com',
    port: 465,
    user: 'hello@scholarixglobal.com',
    pass: env.SMTP_PASS || '',
    fromName: 'SGC TECH AI',
  }
}

async function rateLimitKv(
  kv: KVNamespace,
  key: string,
  windowSec: number,
  maxHits: number
): Promise<boolean> {
  const raw = await kv.get(key)
  const count = raw ? parseInt(raw, 10) : 0
  if (count >= maxHits) return false
  await kv.put(key, String(count + 1), { expirationTtl: windowSec })
  return true
}

function serverRecomputeQuote(
  industryId: string,
  aiFeatureIds: string[],
  moduleIds: string[],
  includeRetainer: boolean
) {
  const ind = INDUSTRIES.find(i => i.id === industryId)
  if (!ind) return null

  const aiCost = aiFeatureIds.reduce((s, id) => {
    const f = AI_FEATURES.find(f => f.id === id)
    return s + (f ? f.cost : 0)
  }, 0)

  const modCost = moduleIds.reduce((s, id) => {
    const m = ODOO_MODULES.find(m => m.id === id)
    return s + (m ? m.cost : 0)
  }, 0)

  const totalSel = aiFeatureIds.length + moduleIds.length
  const days = Math.ceil(ind.avgDeploymentDays * (1 + (totalSel / 10) * 0.15))
  const supportCost = days * 800
  const retainerCost = includeRetainer ? 8000 : 0
  const subtotal = ind.baseCost + aiCost + modCost + supportCost + retainerCost
  const vat = Math.round(subtotal * 0.05)
  const total = subtotal + vat

  const goLive = new Date()
  goLive.setDate(goLive.getDate() + days)

  const aiFeatureNames = aiFeatureIds
    .map(id => AI_FEATURES.find(f => f.id === id)?.name)
    .filter(Boolean) as string[]

  const moduleNames = moduleIds
    .map(id => ODOO_MODULES.find(m => m.id === id)?.name)
    .filter(Boolean) as string[]

  return {
    industry: ind,
    aiCost, modCost, supportCost, retainerCost,
    subtotal, vat, total, days,
    goLiveDate: goLive.toLocaleDateString('en-AE', { day: 'numeric', month: 'short', year: 'numeric' }),
    aiFeatureNames,
    moduleNames,
  }
}

/* ── POST /api/validate-email ────────────────────────────────────── */
api.post('/validate-email', async (c) => {
  const env = c.env as Record<string, string> & { AIRA_BRAIN_KV: KVNamespace }
  const ip = c.req.header('CF-Connecting-IP') || 'unknown'

  const allowed = await rateLimitKv(env.AIRA_BRAIN_KV, `rl:ve:${ip}`, 60, 10)
  if (!allowed) {
    return c.json({ valid: false, reason: 'rate_limited', message: 'Too many requests. Please wait a moment.' }, 429)
  }

  let body: { email?: string }
  try { body = await c.req.json() } catch { return c.json({ valid: false, message: 'Invalid request body' }, 400) }

  const { email } = body
  if (!email || typeof email !== 'string') {
    return c.json({ valid: false, message: 'Email is required' }, 400)
  }

  const result = validateEmail(email.trim())
  if (!result.valid) {
    return c.json({ valid: false, message: VALIDATION_MESSAGES[result.reason] || 'Invalid email.' })
  }

  // Issue a short-lived token after successful validation
  const token = crypto.randomUUID()
  await env.AIRA_BRAIN_KV.put(`qt:${token}`, email.trim().toLowerCase(), { expirationTtl: 600 })

  return c.json({ valid: true, token })
})

/* ── POST /api/send-quote ────────────────────────────────────────── */
api.post('/send-quote', async (c) => {
  const env = c.env as Record<string, string> & { AIRA_BRAIN_KV: KVNamespace }
  const ip = c.req.header('CF-Connecting-IP') || 'unknown'

  const allowed = await rateLimitKv(env.AIRA_BRAIN_KV, `rl:sq:${ip}`, 60, 3)
  if (!allowed) {
    return c.json({ success: false, message: 'Too many requests. Please try again shortly.' }, 429)
  }

  let body: {
    company?: string; email?: string; mobile?: string; _hp?: string
    industryId?: string; aiFeatureIds?: string[]; moduleIds?: string[]
    includeRetainer?: boolean; token?: string
  }
  try { body = await c.req.json() } catch { return c.json({ success: false, message: 'Invalid request' }, 400) }

  // Honeypot — bots fill this hidden field
  if (body._hp) return c.json({ success: false, message: 'Invalid submission' }, 400)

  const { company, email, mobile, industryId, aiFeatureIds = [], moduleIds = [], includeRetainer = false, token } = body

  // Validate required fields
  if (!company?.trim() || !email?.trim() || !mobile?.trim() || !industryId) {
    return c.json({ success: false, message: 'Company, email, mobile and industry are required.' }, 400)
  }

  // Verify token (issued by /validate-email)
  if (!token) return c.json({ success: false, message: 'Email verification required.' }, 400)
  const tokenEmail = await env.AIRA_BRAIN_KV.get(`qt:${token}`)
  if (!tokenEmail || tokenEmail !== email.trim().toLowerCase()) {
    // Re-validate server-side as fallback (token may have expired)
    const recheck = validateEmail(email.trim())
    if (!recheck.valid) {
      return c.json({ success: false, message: VALIDATION_MESSAGES[(recheck as { valid: false; reason: string }).reason] || 'Invalid email.' }, 400)
    }
  }

  // Server-side pricing recompute (never trust client totals)
  const quote = serverRecomputeQuote(industryId, aiFeatureIds, moduleIds, includeRetainer)
  if (!quote) return c.json({ success: false, message: 'Invalid industry selection.' }, 400)

  const quoteNumber = 'SGC-' + Date.now().toString().slice(-6)
  const smtp = getSmtpConfig(env)
  const notificationEmail = env.NOTIFICATION_EMAIL || 'info@sgctech.ai'

  // Send customer email
  const customerHtml = buildCustomerEmailHtml(email, {
    company: company.trim(),
    mobile: mobile.trim(),
    quoteNumber,
    industryName: quote.industry.name,
    baseCost: quote.industry.baseCost,
    aiCost: quote.aiCost,
    modCost: quote.modCost,
    supportCost: quote.supportCost,
    retainerCost: quote.retainerCost,
    subtotal: quote.subtotal,
    vat: quote.vat,
    total: quote.total,
    days: quote.days,
    goLiveDate: quote.goLiveDate,
    aiFeatureNames: quote.aiFeatureNames,
    moduleNames: quote.moduleNames,
    includeRetainer,
  })

  try {
    await sendEmail(smtp, {
      to: email.trim(),
      subject: `Your SGC TECH AI Quote — ${quoteNumber}`,
      html: customerHtml,
    })
  } catch (err) {
    console.error('SMTP send error (customer):', err)
    return c.json({ success: false, message: 'Failed to send email. Please try again.' }, 500)
  }

  // Invalidate token (single-use)
  if (token) await env.AIRA_BRAIN_KV.delete(`qt:${token}`)

  // Non-blocking: send notification to SGC team
  const notifHtml = buildNotificationEmailHtml({
    company: company.trim(),
    email: email.trim(),
    mobile: mobile.trim(),
    quoteNumber,
    industryName: quote.industry.name,
    total: quote.total,
    days: quote.days,
    aiFeatureNames: quote.aiFeatureNames,
    moduleNames: quote.moduleNames,
  })

  // Fire-and-forget notification (don't block response)
  sendEmail(smtp, {
    to: notificationEmail,
    subject: `[Lead] ${quoteNumber} — ${company.trim()} (AED ${quote.total.toLocaleString()})`,
    html: notifHtml,
  }).catch(err => console.error('SMTP send error (notification):', err))

  // Non-blocking: Odoo CRM lead sync
  if (env.ODOO_API_KEY) {
    createOdooLead(
      {
        url: env.ODOO_URL || 'https://scholarixglobal.com',
        db: env.ODOO_DB || 'scholarixglobal',
        user: env.ODOO_USER || 'info@scholarixglobal.com',
        apiKey: env.ODOO_API_KEY,
      },
      {
        company: company.trim(),
        email: email.trim(),
        mobile: mobile.trim(),
        industryName: quote.industry.name,
        quoteNumber,
        totalAmount: quote.total,
        features: quote.aiFeatureNames,
        modules: quote.moduleNames,
      }
    ).catch(err => console.error('Odoo sync error:', err))
  }

  return c.json({ success: true, quoteNumber })
})

export default api
```

Replace the entire modal div (`<!-- Customer Info Modal -->` through `</div><!-- /qb-modal -->`) with:

```tsx
{/* ── Lead Capture Modal ── */}
<div class="qb-modal-overlay" id="qb-modal" aria-modal="true" role="dialog" aria-labelledby="qb-modal-title" hidden>
  <div class="qb-modal-card glass">
    <button class="qb-modal-close" id="qb-modal-close" type="button" aria-label="Close"><QbIcon name="x" size={18} /></button>
    <h3 class="qb-modal-title" id="qb-modal-title">Get Your Quote</h3>
    <p class="qb-modal-sub">Enter your details to download or email your personalised proposal.</p>

    {/* Honeypot — hidden from humans, bots fill it */}
    <div style="display:none;position:absolute;left:-9999px;" aria-hidden="true">
      <input type="text" id="qb-hp" name="website" tabindex={-1} autocomplete="off" />
    </div>

    <div class="qb-field">
      <label for="qb-company">Company Name <span class="qb-required">*</span></label>
      <input type="text" id="qb-company" placeholder="e.g. Meridian Holdings" autocomplete="organization" />
    </div>
    <div class="qb-field">
      <label for="qb-email">Work Email <span class="qb-required">*</span></label>
      <div class="qb-email-wrap">
        <input type="email" id="qb-email" placeholder="you@company.com" autocomplete="email" />
        <span id="qb-email-status" class="qb-email-status" aria-live="polite"></span>
      </div>
    </div>

      <svg width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><polyline points="20 6 9 17 4 12"/></svg>
      Quote sent! Check your inbox (and spam folder just in case).

        Download PDF
      </button>

</div>
```

### 7. UPDATE `public/static/quote-builder.js`

Replace the entire modal section (openModal, closeModal, generatePDF) and the modal event listeners in `init()`.

The key changes:
1. Remove all `#qb-name` references
2. Add email validation token state
3. Add debounced email validation (blur event)
4. Split into `#qb-modal-download` and `#qb-modal-email` handlers
5. Update `generatePDF` signature to `generatePDF(company, email)` — company replaces customerName on cover page
6. Add `sendQuoteEmail()` async function that calls `/api/send-quote`

Here are the specific replacements:

**Replace `openModal` function:**
```javascript
function openModal() {
  const modal = $('qb-modal')
  if (modal) {
    modal.hidden = false
    const companyField = $('qb-company')
    if (companyField) companyField.focus()
    // Reset success/error states
    const success = $('qb-email-success')
    const err = $('qb-modal-error')
    if (success) success.hidden = true
    if (err) { err.hidden = true; err.textContent = '' }
    setEmailStatus('', '')
    emailToken = null
  }
}
```

**Add after the `state` declaration (at top of IIFE, after `state = {...}`):**
```javascript
let emailToken = null  // token issued by /api/validate-email
let emailValidating = false
```

**Replace `closeModal` function:**
```javascript
function closeModal() {
  const modal = $('qb-modal')
  if (modal) modal.hidden = true
  const err = $('qb-modal-error')
  if (err) { err.hidden = true; err.textContent = '' }
}
```

**Add new helper functions (after closeModal):**
```javascript
function setEmailStatus(type, msg) {
  const el = $('qb-email-status')
  if (!el) return
  el.className = 'qb-email-status' + (type ? ' qb-email-status--' + type : '')
  el.textContent = msg
}

function showModalError(msg) {
  const err = $('qb-modal-error')
  if (err) { err.textContent = msg; err.hidden = false }
}

function clearModalError() {
  const err = $('qb-modal-error')
  if (err) { err.hidden = true; err.textContent = '' }
}

async function validateEmailField() {
  const email = $('qb-email')?.value.trim()
  if (!email) { setEmailStatus('', ''); emailToken = null; return false }

  setEmailStatus('checking', 'Checking…')
  emailValidating = true
  try {
    const res = await fetch('/api/validate-email', {
      method: 'POST',
      headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
      body: JSON.stringify({ email }),
    })
    const data = await res.json()
    if (data.valid) {
      emailToken = data.token
      setEmailStatus('valid', '✓ Valid')
      return true
    } else {
      emailToken = null
      setEmailStatus('error', data.message || 'Invalid email')
      return false
    }
  } catch {
    setEmailStatus('error', 'Could not verify email')
    return false
  } finally {
    emailValidating = false
  }
}

async function sendQuoteEmail() {
  const company = $('qb-company')?.value.trim()
  const email = $('qb-email')?.value.trim()
  const mobile = $('qb-mobile')?.value.trim()
  const hp = $('qb-hp')?.value || ''

  if (!company || !email || !mobile) {
    showModalError('Please fill in all required fields.')
    return
  }

  const emailBtn = $('qb-modal-email')
  if (emailBtn) {
    emailBtn.disabled = true
    emailBtn.textContent = 'Sending…'
  }
  clearModalError()

  // Ensure email is validated
  if (!emailToken) {
    const ok = await validateEmailField()
    if (!ok) {
      if (emailBtn) { emailBtn.disabled = false; emailBtn.innerHTML = '<svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><rect x="2" y="4" width="20" height="16" rx="2"/><path d="m22 7-8.97 5.7a1.94 1.94 0 0 1-2.06 0L2 7"/></svg> Email Me This Quote' }
      return
    }
  }

  try {
    const res = await fetch('/api/send-quote', {
      method: 'POST',
      headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
      body: JSON.stringify({
        company, email, mobile, _hp: hp,
        industryId: state.industryId,
        aiFeatureIds: [...state.aiFeatures],
        moduleIds: [...state.modules],
        includeRetainer: state.includeRetainer,
        token: emailToken,
      }),
    })
    const data = await res.json()
    if (data.success) {
      emailToken = null
      const success = $('qb-email-success')
      if (success) success.hidden = false
      const actions = document.querySelector('.qb-modal-actions')
      if (actions) actions.style.display = 'none'
    } else {
      showModalError(data.message || 'Failed to send quote. Please try again.')
      if (emailBtn) { emailBtn.disabled = false; emailBtn.innerHTML = '<svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><rect x="2" y="4" width="20" height="16" rx="2"/><path d="m22 7-8.97 5.7a1.94 1.94 0 0 1-2.06 0L2 7"/></svg> Email Me This Quote' }
    }
  } catch {
    showModalError('Network error. Please try again.')
    if (emailBtn) { emailBtn.disabled = false; emailBtn.innerHTML = '<svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><rect x="2" y="4" width="20" height="16" rx="2"/><path d="m22 7-8.97 5.7a1.94 1.94 0 0 1-2.06 0L2 7"/></svg> Email Me This Quote' }
  }
}
```

**Update `generatePDF` signature** — change `generatePDF(customerName, companyName, customerEmail)` to `generatePDF(company, customerEmail)`:
- In the function signature: `function generatePDF(company, customerEmail) {`
- Change `doc.text(customerName, 18, 98)` to `doc.text(company, 18, 98)`
- Change the `if (companyName) { ... doc.text(companyName, 18, 105) }` block to remove (no longer needed — company IS the main name)
- Keep `if (customerEmail) { doc.text(customerEmail, 18, 112) }` but adjust the y position to `if (customerEmail) { doc.text(customerEmail, 18, 105) }`

**In `init()`, replace the modal event listeners section:**

Replace the entire block from `// Open PDF modal` through `// Generate PDF button ... })` with:

```javascript
// Open PDF modal
$('qb-pdf-btn')?.addEventListener('click', () => {
  if (!state.industryId) {
    $('qb-step-industry')?.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth' })
    return
  }
  openModal()
})

// Modal close
$('qb-modal-close')?.addEventListener('click', closeModal)
$('qb-modal-cancel')?.addEventListener('click', closeModal)
$('qb-modal')?.addEventListener('click', (e) => { if (e.target === $('qb-modal')) closeModal() })
document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => { if (e.key === 'Escape' && !$('qb-modal')?.hidden) closeModal() })

// Debounced email validation on blur
$('qb-email')?.addEventListener('blur', () => {
  const email = $('qb-email')?.value.trim()
  if (email && !emailValidating) validateEmailField()
})
$('qb-email')?.addEventListener('input', () => {
  // Clear token when user edits the email
  emailToken = null
  setEmailStatus('', '')
})

// Download PDF button
$('qb-modal-download')?.addEventListener('click', async () => {
  const company = $('qb-company')?.value.trim()
  const email = $('qb-email')?.value.trim()
  const mobile = $('qb-mobile')?.value.trim()

  if (!company) { showModalError('Please enter your company name.'); $('qb-company')?.focus(); return }
  if (!email) { showModalError('Please enter your work email.'); $('qb-email')?.focus(); return }
  if (!mobile) { showModalError('Please enter your mobile number.'); $('qb-mobile')?.focus(); return }
  clearModalError()

  // Validate email before PDF (ensures real lead capture)
  if (!emailToken) {
    const ok = await validateEmailField()
    if (!ok) return
  }
  closeModal()
  generatePDF(company, email)
})

// Email quote button
$('qb-modal-email')?.addEventListener('click', sendQuoteEmail)
```

### 8. ADD CSS to `public/static/style.css`

Append these styles at the end of the file:

```css
/* ── Quote Builder Lead Form Additions ──────────────────────────── */

/* Email status indicator */
.qb-email-wrap {
  position: relative;
}
.qb-email-wrap input {
  padding-right: 100px;
}
.qb-email-status {
  position: absolute;
  right: 12px;
  top: 50%;
  transform: translateY(-50%);
  font-size: 12px;
  white-space: nowrap;
  color: #b4bed2;
  pointer-events: none;
}
.qb-email-status--checking { color: #b4bed2; }
.qb-email-status--valid    { color: #00d9ff; }
.qb-email-status--error    { color: #ff4d6d; }

/* Dual-button action row */
.qb-modal-actions {
  display: flex;
  gap: 8px;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  justify-content: flex-end;
  margin-top: 20px;
}
.qb-modal-actions .btn {
  flex-shrink: 0;
}
@media (max-width: 480px) {
  .qb-modal-actions {
    flex-direction: column-reverse;
  }
  .qb-modal-actions .btn {
    width: 100%;
    justify-content: center;
  }
}

/* btn-secondary style (for Download PDF) */
.btn-secondary {
  background: transparent;
  border: 1px solid rgba(0, 217, 255, 0.4);
  color: #00d9ff;
}
.btn-secondary:hover {
  background: rgba(0, 217, 255, 0.08);
  border-color: #00d9ff;
}

/* Success message */
.qb-email-success {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 10px;
  padding: 14px 16px;
  background: rgba(0, 217, 255, 0.08);
  border: 1px solid rgba(0, 217, 255, 0.3);
  border-radius: 8px;
  color: #00d9ff;
  font-size: 14px;
  margin-top: 12px;
}

/* Mobile tel input */
#qb-mobile {
  width: 100%;
}
```

## Implementation notes

1. **TypeScript types**: The `KVNamespace` type is a CF Workers global — no import needed in `.ts` files with proper `@cloudflare/workers-types` installed. If type errors occur, use `any` casts with `(c.env as any).AIRA_BRAIN_KV`.

2. **`cloudflare:sockets` import**: Since this is a CF Workers runtime module, TypeScript won't know about it at compile time. Add `// @ts-ignore` before the import.

3. **Build verification**: After implementing, run `npm run build` (the existing Vite build) to verify no TypeScript errors. The build command is in `package.json`.

4. **The `QbIcon` `mail` variant**: Find the `QbIcon` function in `quote-builder.tsx` and add the `mail` case to the switch/if-else.

5. **Do NOT commit the actual SMTP password or Odoo API key** — only the placeholder config in `wrangler.jsonc` vars.

6. **After making all changes, run `npm run build` and report any errors.**

Please implement all files now. For the `quote-builder.js` changes, read the full file first (it's ~500 lines) to understand the exact structure, then make surgical edits using the edit tool. Do not rewrite the entire file — only change what's needed.


</details>

````
## Changes Made

### New files created:
- **`src/utils/smtp.ts`**: Minimal SMTP-over-TLS client using `cloudflare:sockets` for implicit SSL on port 465. Handles EHLO, AUTH LOGIN, MAIL FROM, RCPT TO, DATA with MIME multipart/alternative (base64 plain text + HTML).
- **`src/utils/odoo.ts`**: Odoo JSON-RPC client — authenticates with API key, creates `crm.lead` records with quote details.
- **`src/utils/email-templates.ts`**: Dark navy brand HTML email templates — customer quote email and internal notification email.
- **`src/routes/api.ts`**: Two API endpoints:
  - `POST /api/validate-email` — validates email, issues a short-lived KV token (10-min TTL), rate-limited to 10/min per IP
  - `POST /api/send-quote` — server-side pricing recompute, sends customer email, fire-and-forget notification + Odoo CRM sync, rate-limited to 3/min per IP, honeypot + token verification

### Modified files:
- **`src/index.tsx`**: Added `import apiApp` and `app.route('/api', apiApp)`
- **`src/routes/quote-builder.tsx`**: Replaced old 3-field modal (name/company/email, one button) with new 3-field modal (company/mobile/email, Download PDF + Email Me This Quote buttons), honeypot, email status indicator, success message
- **`public/static/quote-builder.js`**: Surgical edits — added `emailToken`/`emailValidating` state, replaced `openModal`/`closeModal`, added `setEmailStatus`, `showModalError`, `clearModalError`, `validateEmailField`, `sendQuoteEmail` functions, updated `generatePDF(company, email)` signature (removed customerName/companyName), replaced all modal event listeners
- **`public/static/style.css`**: Appended email status indicator, dual-action button row, `btn-secondary`, success message, and mobile tel styles
- **`wrangler.jsonc`**: Added `vars` block with non-secret config

### Vite config fix:
- **`vite.config.ts`**: Added `build.rollupOptions.external: ['cloudflare:sockets']` — required for Rollup to skip resolving the CF Workers runtime module at build time.

## Verification
- **Build**: `npm run build` → ✅ `dist/_worker.js 171.00 kB · built in 297ms`
- **No leftover debug references**: grep for `qb-name|qb-modal-generate|customerName|companyName` → no matches
````
